name: schema-therapy
description: An 11-skill modelling pipeline that turns a product intent + domain description into a chain of validated, harness-verified artifacts (specs/00-10): impact map → event storming → glossary → aggregates → ERD → statecharts → Gherkin → personas → task models → UI flows → flow acceptance — re-verified suite-wide by a drift-police audit. Grounded in the old discipline (Codd's normal forms, Chen's entities, Harel's statecharts), every artifact passes an executable oracle before it ships.
